codeReview.summary: The feature adds parser-only resolver fixture helpers and a focused regression in crates/h7cad-native-dwg/tests/read_headers.rs covering layer tables, layout/block pairs, model-space versus paper-space ownership, block-owned entities, and invalid semantic references while explicitly tagging parser-emitted handles for later resolver assertions. The implementation matches the feature description and expected behavior, and I did not find correctness issues in the reviewed commit.

summary: Reviewed the feature handoff, transcript skeleton, worker skill, architecture guidance, and commit 2d748b3. The change stays within the parser-only fixture surface, follows the documented dwg-fixture-worker procedure, and provides the expected resolver-hardening ownership fixtures without widening runtime scope.
